MESSAGE_BODY_REQUIRED: Message must include text or attachments
NO_MEMBER_TO_TRANSFER: No other member available to transfer ownership
NOT_GROUP_MEMBER: You are not a member of this group
NOT_GROUP_ADMIN: Only group admins can perform this action
CANNOT_EDIT_OTHERS: You can only edit your own messages
CANNOT_DELETE_OTHERS: You can only delete your own messages
